response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project involvement through GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or navigation pipelines, and his work with DLang and Node.js doesn't clearly demonstrate the low-latency, distributed systems expertise required for routing tiling at scale.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Proven ability to learn and apply diverse languages and systems across domains
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling best practices
concerns: No demonstrated commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or navigation systems
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js, not low-level systems or geospatial data pipelines
Lacks clear evidence of distributed systems design for fault-tolerant, high-throughput routing data
